description: Color photograph of an outdoor parking-lot scene where an ICE officer in a dark blue raid jacket marked 'POLICE' and 'ICE' (yellow lettering on the back) stands at the open side door of a large black SUV, with a wire-mesh partition visible inside. A male detainee, a dark-haired man in a black track jacket with white sleeve stripes, sits or steps in the doorway with his hands restrained in front. The officer wears blue jeans. The background shows trees, a fence, and overcast sky. There is no on-image text, headline, slogan, or graphic overlay, and no added typography or seal beyond the agency markings printed on the officer's jacket. Per the tweet, it accompanies a post about ICE ERO Los Angeles turning a man (wanted in Mexico for child rape) over to Mexican authorities at the San Ysidro port of entry.
